title: A Secret Under the Bridge
content: During a weekend hike, Nora noticed an old metal box tucked beneath a stone bridge. It was hidden well enough that few people would have seen it. Curious, she opened it and found several handwritten letters wrapped in plastic. Each letter was dated many years apart and described the writer's hopes, fears, and dreams. Later, the local historical society explained that the box was part of a community tradition in which residents left messages for future generations. The bridge had quietly protected these personal stories for decades. Instead of uncovering a forgotten crime or hidden treasure, Nora discovered something even more meaningful—a collection of voices from the past waiting to be remembered.
